Taliban ban on Afghan women at UN premises continues since September 2025 — life-saving aid operations severely compromised. Taliban Decree No.12 authorises domestic violence; No.18 removes minimum marriage age. Multiple UNSC speakers urged Taliban reversal. Health system near catastrophe.

countries/north-korea.summary: 4+ kwalliso camps operating; 100,000–200,000 prisoners including families. Forced labor in mines, timber, agriculture under starvation conditions. OHCHR 2025: total control maintained; surveillance and censorship intensified. Camp at northeast expanded.

countries/myanmar.summary: June 1 airstrikes on IDP camps in Rakhine State: 2 civilians killed at Kyaung Cha Twin IDP camp while residents slept; 4 jet fighters + Y-12 transport bombed Taungup shelters. Fresh wave of displacement. 2025 was deadliest year for aerial attacks since 2021 coup. 5.2M displaced; junta controls 21% territory; 15,000+ killed since coup.

countries/turkmenistan.summary: 173rd/180 World Press Freedom Index. Activist Maral Annayeva extradited from UAE on INTERPOL notice April 2026 for criticising government. Two dissidents disappeared in Turkey summer 2025 — whereabouts unknown. Raids to confiscate Starlink devices. Ongoing enforced disappearances and torture.

countries/haiti.summary: 1.4M+ displaced by gang violence. ~6M (half population) acutely food insecure. 4,388 killed by gangs Jan–Sep 2025; SGBV +34%. Ongoing catastrophic crisis with no end in sight.
